---
title: "SIRV Discovery Comparison: With vs. Without SIRV Annotation"
author: "Fabian Jetzinger"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    code_download: false
    toc: TRUE
    toc_depth: 2
    theme: spacelab
    self_contained: true
    highlight: tango
    fig_width: 12
    fig_height: 8
    fig_caption: true
    df_print: kable
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE,
                      fig.pos = "h", fig.align = "center")

library(tidyverse)
library(ggthemes)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)
library(ggstats)
library(cowplot)
library(ggpubr)

r_source_dir <- if (dir.exists("R")) "R" else "src/plotting/R"

source(file.path(r_source_dir, "01_config.R"))
source(file.path(r_source_dir, "02_themes.R"))
source(file.path(r_source_dir, "06_sirv_analysis.R"))
```


```{r config}
sirv_base <- if (dir.exists("data/sirv_results")) {
  "data/sirv_results"
} else {
  "../../data/sirv_results"
}

sirv_dirs <- list(
  IsoSeq = list(
    IsoQuant      = file.path(sirv_base, "isoseq/isoquant"),
    FLAIR         = file.path(sirv_base, "isoseq/flair"),
    TALON         = file.path(sirv_base, "isoseq/talon"),
    Bambu         = file.path(sirv_base, "isoseq/bambu"),
    Mandalorion   = file.path(sirv_base, "isoseq/mandalorion"),
    `IsoSeq + SQANTI3` = file.path(sirv_base, "isoseq/isoseq_sqanti")
  ),
  ONT = list(
    IsoQuant = file.path(sirv_base, "ont/isoquant"),
    FLAIR    = file.path(sirv_base, "ont/flair"),
    TALON    = file.path(sirv_base, "ont/talon"),
    Bambu    = file.path(sirv_base, "ont/bambu")
  )
)

annotation_palette <- c("With SIRV GTF" = "#15918A", "Without SIRV GTF" = "#F58A53")

load_sirv_df_list <- function(dir) {
  rdata_path <- file.path(dir, "Bclass_df_list.RData")
  if (!file.exists(rdata_path)) {
    warning(paste("File not found:", rdata_path))
    return(NULL)
  }
  env <- new.env()
  load(rdata_path, envir = env)
  env$Bclass_df_list
}

load_original_df_list <- function(dir) {
  rdata_path <- file.path(dir, "Bclass_df_list.RData")
  if (!file.exists(rdata_path)) {
    warning(paste("File not found:", rdata_path))
    return(NULL)
  }
  env <- new.env()
  load(rdata_path, envir = env)
  env$Bclass_df_list
}
```


# Data Loading & Metrics Calculation

```{r load-and-compute, results='hide'}
samples_of_interest <- c("Join&Call", "Call&Join")

compute_metrics_for_dirs <- function(dirs, condition_label) {
  results <- list()
  for (platform in names(dirs)) {
    for (method in names(dirs[[platform]])) {
      df_list <- load_sirv_df_list(dirs[[platform]][[method]])
      if (is.null(df_list)) next

      names(df_list) <- sample_names_Brain[seq_along(df_list)]

      for (sample_name in names(df_list)) {
        sirv_result <- tryCatch(
          calculate_sirv_metrics(df_list[[sample_name]]),
          error = function(e) NULL
        )
        if (is.null(sirv_result)) next

        metrics_wide <- sirv_result$metrics %>%
          mutate(Value = as.numeric(gsub("%", "", Value))) %>%
          pivot_wider(names_from = Metric, values_from = Value)

        row <- tibble(
          platform = platform,
          method = method,
          sample = sample_name,
          condition = condition_label,
          n_transcripts = nrow(sirv_result$sirv_df),
          n_missing = length(sirv_result$sirv_fn),
          missing_sirvs = list(sirv_result$sirv_fn)
        ) %>% bind_cols(metrics_wide)

        results[[length(results) + 1]] <- row
      }
    }
  }
  bind_rows(results)
}

without_annot_df <- compute_metrics_for_dirs(sirv_dirs, "Without SIRV GTF")

with_annot_df <- compute_metrics_for_dirs(src_dirs, "With SIRV GTF")

comparison_df <- bind_rows(with_annot_df, without_annot_df) %>%
  mutate(
    method = recode(method, "isoseq_sqanti" = "IsoSeq + SQANTI3"),
    condition = factor(condition, levels = c("With SIRV GTF", "Without SIRV GTF")),
    method = factor(method, levels = c("IsoQuant", "FLAIR", "Bambu", "TALON",
                                       "Mandalorion", "IsoSeq + SQANTI3"))
  )

cat(sprintf("Loaded %d rows: %d with annotation, %d without\n",
            nrow(comparison_df), sum(comparison_df$condition == "With SIRV GTF"),
            sum(comparison_df$condition == "Without SIRV GTF")))
```


# Overview Table {.tabset}

## Join&Call

```{r table-jc, results='asis'}
comparison_df %>%
  filter(sample == "Join&Call") %>%
  select(platform, method, condition, Sensitivity, Precision,
         `Positive Detection Rate`, `False Discovery Rate`,
         `False Detection Rate`, Redundancy, n_transcripts, n_missing) %>%
  arrange(platform, method, condition) %>%
  knitr::kable(digits = 2, caption = "SIRV metrics comparison: Join&Call")
```

## Call&Join

```{r table-cj, results='asis'}
comparison_df %>%
  filter(sample == "Call&Join") %>%
  select(platform, method, condition, Sensitivity, Precision,
         `Positive Detection Rate`, `False Discovery Rate`,
         `False Detection Rate`, Redundancy, n_transcripts, n_missing) %>%
  arrange(platform, method, condition) %>%
  knitr::kable(digits = 2, caption = "SIRV metrics comparison: Call&Join")
```


# Metric Comparison Plots {.tabset}

```{r metric-comparison-plots, fig.width=14, fig.height=10, results='asis'}
key_metrics <- c("Sensitivity", "Positive Detection Rate", "Precision",
                 "False Discovery Rate", "False Detection Rate", "Redundancy")

for (sample_name in samples_of_interest) {
  cat(sprintf("\n\n## %s\n\n", sample_name))

  plot_df <- comparison_df %>%
    filter(sample == sample_name) %>%
    select(platform, method, condition, all_of(key_metrics)) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = all_of(key_metrics), names_to = "Metric", values_to = "Value") %>%
    mutate(Metric = factor(Metric, levels = key_metrics))

  p <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = method, y = Value, fill = condition)) +
    geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.7) +
    geom_text(aes(label = round(Value, 1)),
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
              vjust = -0.3, size = 2.5) +
    facet_grid(Metric ~ platform, scales = "free", space = "free_x") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = annotation_palette, name = "Annotation") +
    scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Value (%)",
         title = paste("SIRV Metrics Comparison:", sample_name)) +
    theme_Publication() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 9),
      strip.text = element_text(size = 10),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    )

  print(p)
}
```


# Sensitivity & Detection Rate (Focused) {.tabset}

```{r sensitivity-focused, fig.width=12, fig.height=5, results='asis'}
for (sample_name in samples_of_interest) {
  cat(sprintf("\n\n## %s\n\n", sample_name))

  plot_df <- comparison_df %>%
    filter(sample == sample_name) %>%
    select(platform, method, condition, Sensitivity, `Positive Detection Rate`) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = c(Sensitivity, `Positive Detection Rate`),
                 names_to = "Metric", values_to = "Value")

  p <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = method, y = Value, fill = condition)) +
    geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.7) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 100, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
    facet_grid(Metric ~ platform, scales = "free_x", space = "free_x") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = annotation_palette, name = "Annotation") +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 105)) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Value (%)",
         title = paste("SIRV Sensitivity & Detection Rate:", sample_name)) +
    theme_Publication() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 10),
      strip.text = element_text(size = 11),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    )

  print(p)
}
```


# Difference Plot (Without - With)

```{r difference-plot, fig.width=12, fig.height=8}
diff_metrics <- c("Sensitivity", "Positive Detection Rate", "Precision",
                  "False Discovery Rate", "Redundancy")

lower_is_better <- c("False Discovery Rate", "Redundancy")

diff_df <- comparison_df %>%
  filter(sample %in% samples_of_interest) %>%
  select(platform, method, sample, condition, all_of(diff_metrics)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(diff_metrics), names_to = "Metric", values_to = "Value") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = condition, values_from = Value) %>%
  mutate(
    Difference = `Without SIRV GTF` - `With SIRV GTF`,
    improved = ifelse(Metric %in% lower_is_better, Difference < 0, Difference > 0),
    Metric = factor(Metric, levels = diff_metrics)
  )

ggplot(diff_df, aes(x = method, y = Difference, fill = improved)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.4) +
  facet_grid(Metric ~ platform + sample, scales = "free", space = "free_x") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#78C679", "FALSE" = "#EE6A50"),
                    labels = c("TRUE" = "Improved", "FALSE" = "Degraded"),
                    name = NULL) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Difference (pp)",
       title = "Change in SIRV metrics: Without annotation vs. With annotation",
       subtitle = "Green = improved without annotation (lower is better for FDR & Redundancy)") +
  theme_Publication() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 8),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 9),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )
```


# Per-Transcript Detection Heatmap

```{r detection-heatmap, fig.width=14, fig.height=12}
src_dirs_key <- c("IsoSeq + SQANTI3" = "isoseq_sqanti")

detection_rows <- list()

for (platform in names(sirv_dirs)) {
  for (method in names(sirv_dirs[[platform]])) {
    sirv_list <- load_sirv_df_list(sirv_dirs[[platform]][[method]])
    orig_key <- ifelse(method %in% names(src_dirs_key), src_dirs_key[[method]], method)
    orig_list <- load_original_df_list(src_dirs[[platform]][[orig_key]])

    if (is.null(sirv_list) || is.null(orig_list)) next

    names(sirv_list) <- sample_names_Brain[seq_along(sirv_list)]
    names(orig_list) <- sample_names_Brain[seq_along(orig_list)]

    for (sample_name in samples_of_interest) {
      if (!(sample_name %in% names(sirv_list)) || !(sample_name %in% names(orig_list))) next

      orig_metrics <- tryCatch(calculate_sirv_metrics(orig_list[[sample_name]]), error = function(e) NULL)
      sirv_metrics <- tryCatch(calculate_sirv_metrics(sirv_list[[sample_name]]), error = function(e) NULL)
      if (is.null(orig_metrics) || is.null(sirv_metrics)) next

      orig_detected <- setdiff(real_sirvs, orig_metrics$sirv_fn)
      sirv_detected <- setdiff(real_sirvs, sirv_metrics$sirv_fn)

      for (sirv in real_sirvs) {
        detection_rows[[length(detection_rows) + 1]] <- tibble(
          platform = platform, method = method, sample = sample_name,
          sirv = sirv,
          with_annot = sirv %in% orig_detected,
          without_annot = sirv %in% sirv_detected
        )
      }
    }
  }
}

detection_df <- bind_rows(detection_rows) %>%
  mutate(
    status = case_when(
      with_annot & without_annot   ~ "Both",
      with_annot & !without_annot  ~ "Only with annotation",
      !with_annot & without_annot  ~ "Only without annotation",
      TRUE                         ~ "Neither"
    ),
    status = factor(status, levels = c("Both", "Only with annotation", "Only without annotation", "Neither")),
    tool_label = paste(platform, method, sep = "\n")
  )

status_palette <- c(
  "Both"                      = "#4DAF4A",
  "Only with annotation"      = "#FF7F00",
  "Only without annotation"   = "#E41A1C",
  "Neither"                   = "#D9D9D9"
)

detection_both <- detection_df %>%
  filter(sample %in% samples_of_interest) %>%
  mutate(sample = factor(sample, levels = c("Join&Call", "Call&Join")))

if (nrow(detection_both) > 0) {
  ggplot(detection_both, aes(x = tool_label, y = sirv, fill = status)) +
    geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.3) +
    facet_grid(~ sample) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = status_palette, name = "Detection") +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL,
         title = "Per-SIRV transcript detection") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5, size = 8),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6),
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    )
}

method_levels <- levels(comparison_df$method)

xpos_map <- detection_both %>%
  distinct(platform, method) %>%
  arrange(factor(platform, levels = c("IsoSeq", "ONT")),
          factor(method, levels = method_levels)) %>%
  mutate(method_idx = row_number())

platform_gap <- 1.5
tool_gap <- 0.4
pair_width <- 1.0

xpos_map <- xpos_map %>%
  mutate(
    platform_offset = cumsum(c(0, diff(as.numeric(factor(platform))) * platform_gap)),
    base_x = (method_idx - 1) * (pair_width * 2 + tool_gap) + platform_offset
  )

detection_by_method <- detection_both %>%
  mutate(sample_short = ifelse(sample == "Join&Call", "J&C", "C&J")) %>%
  left_join(xpos_map, by = c("platform", "method")) %>%
  mutate(
    x_pos = base_x + ifelse(sample == "Join&Call", 0, pair_width),
    x_label = paste0(method, "\n", sample_short)
  )

tick_df <- detection_by_method %>%
  distinct(platform, method, sample_short, x_pos, x_label)

method_label_df <- xpos_map %>%
  mutate(label_x = base_x + pair_width / 2)

if (nrow(detection_by_method) > 0) {
  ggplot(detection_by_method, aes(x = x_pos, y = sirv, fill = status)) +
    geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.3, width = pair_width * 0.95) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = tick_df$x_pos,
      labels = tick_df$sample_short,
      expand = expansion(add = 0.8)
    ) +
    geom_text(data = method_label_df,
              aes(x = label_x, y = -Inf, label = method),
              inherit.aes = FALSE, vjust = 2.5, size = 3, fontface = "bold") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = status_palette, name = "Detection") +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL,
         title = "Per-SIRV transcript detection by method") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 7),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6),
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      plot.margin = margin(t = 5, r = 10, b = 30, l = 10),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    )
}
```


# Detection Summary

```{r detection-summary, results='asis'}
detection_summary <- detection_df %>%
  group_by(platform, method, sample, status) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = status, values_from = n, values_fill = 0)

knitr::kable(detection_summary,
             caption = paste("Per-transcript detection status across",
                             n_sirvs, "real SIRV transcripts"))
```


# Individual Samples {.tabset}

```{r individual-samples, fig.width=14, fig.height=6, results='asis'}
individual_samples <- setdiff(unique(comparison_df$sample), samples_of_interest)

if (length(individual_samples) > 0) {
  ind_df <- comparison_df %>%
    filter(sample %in% individual_samples) %>%
    select(platform, method, sample, condition, Sensitivity, `Positive Detection Rate`) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = c(Sensitivity, `Positive Detection Rate`),
                 names_to = "Metric", values_to = "Value")

  for (plt in unique(ind_df$platform)) {
    cat(sprintf("\n\n## %s\n\n", plt))

    p <- ind_df %>%
      filter(platform == plt) %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = sample, y = Value, fill = condition)) +
      geom_col(position = position_dodge2(width = 0.8, preserve = "single"), width = 0.7) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 100, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
      facet_grid(Metric ~ method, scales = "free_x", space = "free_x") +
      scale_fill_manual(values = annotation_palette, name = "Annotation") +
      coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 105)) +
      labs(x = NULL, y = "Value (%)",
           title = paste("Individual sample SIRV metrics:", plt)) +
      theme_Publication() +
      theme(
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 8),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 10),
        legend.position = "bottom"
      )

    print(p)
  }
}
```


# Dumbbell Plots

```{r dumbbell-functions}
dumbbell_metric_order <- c("Sn", "PDR", "nrPre", "rPre", "1/red", "1-FDR")

to_dumbbell_metrics <- function(df) {
  tibble(
    Sn      = df$Sensitivity,
    PDR     = df$`Positive Detection Rate`,
    nrPre   = df$`Non-redundant Precision`,
    rPre    = df$Precision,
    `1/red` = ifelse(df$Redundancy == 0, NA_real_, 10000 / df$Redundancy),
    `1-FDR` = 100 - df$`False Discovery Rate`
  )
}

build_sirv_comparison_dumbbell <- function(comparison_df, platform_filter, method_filter,
                                           title,
                                           metric_order = dumbbell_metric_order,
                                           show_x_axis = TRUE) {
  jc_with <- comparison_df %>%
    filter(platform == platform_filter, method == method_filter,
           sample == "Join&Call", condition == "With SIRV GTF")
  jc_without <- comparison_df %>%
    filter(platform == platform_filter, method == method_filter,
           sample == "Join&Call", condition == "Without SIRV GTF")
  cj_with <- comparison_df %>%
    filter(platform == platform_filter, method == method_filter,
           sample == "Call&Join", condition == "With SIRV GTF")
  cj_without <- comparison_df %>%
    filter(platform == platform_filter, method == method_filter,
           sample == "Call&Join", condition == "Without SIRV GTF")

  if (any(sapply(list(jc_with, jc_without, cj_with, cj_without), nrow) == 0)) return(NULL)

  jc_with_m    <- to_dumbbell_metrics(jc_with)
  jc_without_m <- to_dumbbell_metrics(jc_without)
  cj_with_m    <- to_dumbbell_metrics(cj_with)
  cj_without_m <- to_dumbbell_metrics(cj_without)

  metrics_long <- bind_rows(
    tibble(method_dataset = "concat_with",    metric = names(jc_with_m),    value = as.numeric(jc_with_m[1, ])),
    tibble(method_dataset = "concat_without", metric = names(jc_without_m), value = as.numeric(jc_without_m[1, ])),
    tibble(method_dataset = "tama_with",      metric = names(cj_with_m),    value = as.numeric(cj_with_m[1, ])),
    tibble(method_dataset = "tama_without",   metric = names(cj_without_m), value = as.numeric(cj_without_m[1, ]))
  ) %>%
    mutate(metric = factor(metric, levels = rev(metric_order)))

  metrics_wide <- metrics_long %>%
    separate(method_dataset, into = c("method", "dataset"), sep = "_") %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = method, values_from = value)

  points_df <- metrics_wide %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = c(concat, tama), names_to = "method", values_to = "value")

  p <- ggplot() +
    ggstats::geom_stripped_rows(
      data = metrics_wide, aes(y = metric), width = 1, nudge_y = 0
    ) +
    geom_segment(
      data = metrics_wide,
      aes(x = concat, xend = tama, y = metric, yend = metric, color = dataset),
      size = 1.2,
      position = position_nudge(
        y = ifelse(metrics_wide$dataset == "with", 0.15, -0.15)
      )
    ) +
    geom_point(
      data = points_df,
      aes(x = value, y = metric, shape = method, fill = dataset, color = dataset),
      size = 3, stroke = 0.8,
      position = position_nudge(
        y = ifelse(points_df$dataset == "with", 0.15, -0.15)
      )
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      name   = "Annotation",
      values = c("with" = "#15918A", "without" = "#F58A53"),
      labels = c("with" = "With SIRV annotation", "without" = "Without SIRV annotation"),
      guide  = guide_legend(
        override.aes = list(shape = 22, size = 5, linetype = 0, stroke = 0,
                            fill = c("#15918A", "#F58A53")),
        order = 1
      )
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = c("with" = "#15918A", "without" = "#F58A53"),
      guide  = "none"
    ) +
    scale_shape_manual(
      name   = "Strategy",
      values = c("concat" = 16, "tama" = 17),
      labels = c("concat" = "Join & Call", "tama" = "Call & Join"),
      guide  = guide_legend(
        override.aes = list(fill = "black", size = 3),
        order = 2
      )
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 100), clip = "off") +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = title) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      plot.title         = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 16),
      plot.margin        = margin(t = 5, r = 20, b = 5, l = 20, unit = "pt"),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
      panel.background   = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      axis.text          = element_text(size = 10),
      axis.text.y        = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
      axis.title         = element_text(size = 12),
      legend.box         = "horizontal",
      legend.position    = "right",
      legend.title       = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
      legend.text        = element_text(size = 12)
    )

  if (!show_x_axis) {
    p <- p + theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank())
  }

  p
}

assemble_sirv_comparison_dumbbells <- function(comparison_df) {
  tool_grid <- list(
    list(platform = "IsoSeq", method = "IsoQuant",      label = "IsoQuant",          bottom = FALSE),
    list(platform = "IsoSeq", method = "FLAIR",          label = "FLAIR",             bottom = FALSE),
    list(platform = "IsoSeq", method = "Bambu",          label = "Bambu",             bottom = FALSE),
    list(platform = "IsoSeq", method = "TALON",          label = "TALON",             bottom = FALSE),
    list(platform = "IsoSeq", method = "Mandalorion",    label = "Mandalorion",       bottom = FALSE),
    list(platform = "IsoSeq", method = "IsoSeq + SQANTI3",  label = "IsoSeq + SQANTI3",  bottom = FALSE),
    list(platform = "ONT",    method = "IsoQuant",       label = "IsoQuant",          bottom = TRUE),
    list(platform = "ONT",    method = "FLAIR",           label = "FLAIR",             bottom = TRUE),
    list(platform = "ONT",    method = "Bambu",           label = "Bambu",             bottom = TRUE),
    list(platform = "ONT",    method = "TALON",           label = "TALON",             bottom = TRUE)
  )

  plots <- list()
  for (entry in tool_grid) {
    p <- build_sirv_comparison_dumbbell(
      comparison_df, entry$platform, entry$method, entry$label,
      show_x_axis = entry$bottom
    )
    if (!is.null(p)) plots[[paste(entry$platform, entry$label)]] <- p
  }
  plots
}
```


```{r dumbbell-assembled, fig.width=18, fig.height=12}
db_plots <- assemble_sirv_comparison_dumbbells(comparison_df)

if (length(db_plots) > 0) {
  legend_grob <- cowplot::get_legend(db_plots[[1]])
  legend_panel <- ggpubr::as_ggplot(legend_grob)

  no_legend <- lapply(db_plots, function(p) p + theme(legend.position = "none"))

  isoseq_names <- grep("^IsoSeq", names(no_legend), value = TRUE)
  ont_names    <- grep("^ONT", names(no_legend), value = TRUE)

  isoseq_plots <- no_legend[isoseq_names]
  ont_plots    <- no_legend[ont_names]

  while (length(isoseq_plots) < 6) isoseq_plots[[length(isoseq_plots) + 1]] <- plot_spacer()
  while (length(ont_plots) < 4) ont_plots[[length(ont_plots) + 1]] <- plot_spacer()

  x_label <- ggplot() +
    annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = "Metric value (%)",
             size = 5, fontface = "plain") +
    theme_void()

  db_assembled <- (
    isoseq_plots[[1]] + isoseq_plots[[2]] + isoseq_plots[[3]] + isoseq_plots[[4]] +
    isoseq_plots[[5]] + isoseq_plots[[6]] + legend_panel +
    plot_spacer() +
    ont_plots[[1]] + ont_plots[[2]] + ont_plots[[3]] + ont_plots[[4]] +
    x_label
  ) +
    plot_layout(
      design = "
        ABCD
        EFGG
        HHHH
        IJKM
        NNNN
      ",
      heights = c(1, 1, 0.15, 1, 0.08)
    ) +
    plot_annotation(
      title = "SIRV evaluation: With vs. Without SIRV annotation",
      theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 22, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))
    )

  label_a <- ggplot() +
    annotate("text", x = .5, y = .5, label = "a", size = 10, fontface = "bold") +
    theme_void()
  label_b <- ggplot() +
    annotate("text", x = .5, y = .5, label = "b", size = 10, fontface = "bold") +
    theme_void()

  final_db <- wrap_elements(db_assembled) +
    inset_element(label_a, left = -0.02, bottom = 0.90, right = 0.05, top = 1) +
    inset_element(label_b, left = -0.02, bottom = 0.30, right = 0.05, top = 0.40)

  print(final_db)

  ggsave("plot_creation/sirv_comparison_dumbbell.pdf",
         device = cairo_pdf, plot = final_db, width = 18, height = 12, unit = "in")
}
```


# Export

```{r export}
if (!dir.exists("plot_creation")) dir.create("plot_creation")

export_df <- comparison_df %>%
  select(-missing_sirvs)

write_csv(export_df, "plot_creation/sirv_comparison_metrics.csv")

cat(sprintf("Exported %d rows to plot_creation/sirv_comparison_metrics.csv\n", nrow(export_df)))
```
